title: Voice payments

posts.author: opustech (Opus Technologies)
posts.cookedHtml: Voice payment systems is now activated with sufficient features that lets you to access transactions anywhere in the world. To keep it more supported and upgraded all the time, make sure your device recognize voice-enabled payments to perform operations faster.
